description: Based in Victoria, BC, Jesse Roper is an artist with a penchant for writing modern indie infused blues music and delivering bombastic live performances buoyed by his virtuosic guitar playing. His innate and impressive musical talent has served him well in recent years. The stage is where Roper shines, and has been his home since overcoming crippling stage fright during his early twenties. Roper’s new album, Horizons marks a sonic high point in his career thus far.
title: Jesse Roper Concert
